title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And he's abdicated the throne of Dressrosa!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the hell! Check out today's paper!!

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
